title: cobblemon super neta
description: cobblemon and more pokemon and more things
body:
a modpack from the chanel super neta and the server superneta.aternos.me A Vast Pokédex: Encounter and capture Pokémon from multiple generations (often Gens 1-9), with custom models that blend seamlessly with the Minecraft aesthetic.

Deep Battle Mechanics: Engage in competitive-style Pokémon battles utilizing the Pokémon Showdown! engine for accurate, strategic, and balanced combat.

Expanded Gameplay: Discover features often missing in the base mod, such as:

Mega Evolutions, Z-Moves, and/or Terastallization.

Pokémon Breeding for IVs, Natures, and shiny hunting.

Rideable Pokémon for faster travel across land, water, and air.

Legendary Pokémon Quests and Structures where Mythical and Legendary Pokémon can be found and challenged.

Enhanced World Exploration:

Find Pokémon-themed Towns and Structures (e.g., Gyms, Poké Centers, and Marts).

Navigate with Mini-maps and PokéNavs that display Pokémon spawns and biomes.

Experience new world generation (biomes/structures) that are perfect habitats for specific Pokémon types.

Challenging Trainers: Test your team against a variety of NPC Trainers, including challenging Gym Leaders and Elite Four members with progression systems and level caps.

Quality of Life & Immersion: Includes dozens of quality-of-life mods for performance optimization (better FPS) and improved visuals/sound, creating a smooth and immersive adventure.

Build, battle, explore, and become the very best Pokémon Trainer in the world of Minecraft!
